message:
Restrict formatting to current directory

Skip files outside the active working directory and ignore paths
that traverse symlinks.

This keeps formatter runs scoped to the workspace being edited
and avoids rewriting unrelated temporary or out-of-scope files.

files.patch:
@@ -20,6 +20,9 @@ pi install npm:pi-formatter
 `pi-formatter` detects file types and runs the appropriate formatter as
 best-effort post-processing. Formatter failures never block tool results.
 
+Formatting is limited to files inside the current working directory. Paths
+outside the current directory and paths that traverse symlinks are ignored.
+
 Formatting modes:
 
 - `tool`: format immediately after each successful `write` or `edit` tool call.

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Formatting scope limited to the current directory
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-04-15T11:52:40.201426Z
+---
+
+`pi-formatter` now limits formatting to files under the current working directory for the active agent run.
+
+Paths outside that directory, including files reached through symlinked directories, are ignored. This keeps formatting focused on the workspace the agent is editing and avoids reformatting unrelated temporary or out-of-scope files.
